mapper.select: SELECT i.*, ste.site_nm AS site_nm, prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm, att.file_nm AS attach_nm FROM pd_prod_img i LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = i.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = i.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_attach att ON att.attach_id = i.attach_id WHERE i.prod_img_id = #{id}
